content:
If you’re in the market for an excellent 3-in-1 charging stand to use with your Apple devices, Anker’s new 3-in-1 Prime MagSafe charger could be an excellent pick. It offers 25W MagSafe charging with Qi2.2 support for iPhone, as well as support for Apple Watch and AirPods – making it an excellent pick for Apple users.

There’s plenty of MagSafe charging stands on the market, but not many of them support Qi2.2 with 25W of charging. This Anker Prime 3-in-1 does, meaning you can take advantage of the highest charging speeds on supported iPhone 16 and iPhone 17 models.

The Anker Prime 3-in-1 normally comes in at $229.99, but right now it’s on sale for $80 off at $149.99. That still isn’t super cheap, but it comes with some excellent features to justify the higher price tag – and it brings it in line with many other options on the market.

Best features

For one, it offers a premium build. The fantastic unboxing presentation and the hefty feel back that up. The Anker Prime 3-in-1 doesn’t feel cheap, and its stainless steel arms look quite sleek. It also comes with a 65W charging brick and cable in the box, so you won’t need to purchase anything else to get started.

Build aside though, it also offers a pretty cool built-in display that offers charging information for each of your three connected devices. You can easily monitor your total power output, as well as the wattage being used by each of your devices.

For the iPhone MagSafe ring, it offers an adjustable hinge, so you can freely rotate your iPhone up and down as needed. This is a big plus point, as many chargers on the market leave your iPhone in a fixed position.

This MagSafe ring also includes a fan, ensuring your device doesn’t overheat whilst charging – a common issue while wireless charging. This means your phone will charge faster, and the battery will degrade less.

Wrap up

Overall, if you’re looking to expand your MagSafe ecosystem, or are just looking for a nice 3-in-1 MagSafe charging option for your nightstand or whatnot – the Anker Prime 3-in-1 is a fantastic choice to consider. It offers everything you’ll need to charge your iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods, all while looking sleek and supporting the fastest wireless charging standards.

You can purchase the Anker Prime 3-in-1 MagSafe charging stand for $149.99 on Amazon, in either Phantom Gray or White.

  • Buy Anker Prime 3-in-1 in White – $149.99 on Amazon
  • Buy Anker Prime 3-in-1 in Phantom Gray – $149.99 on Amazon
